    Adds an event to this EP's list of events.

    Represents an administrative staff member in the university events app.

    B

    BOOK_EVENT - Enum constant in enum class controller.StudentMenuOptions
     
    Booking - Class in model
    Represents a booking made by a Student for a particular Performance in the events app.
    Booking(long, Student, Performance, int, double) - Constructor for class model.Booking
    Constructs a new Booking.
    BookingController - Class in controller
    Controller responsible for booking-related operations in the events app.
    BookingController(View, List<Performance>, PaymentSystem) - Constructor for class controller.BookingController
    Constructs a new BookingController.
    BookingStatus - Enum Class in model
     
    bookPerformance() - Method in class controller.BookingController
    Only a Student may book a performance.

    Only the EntertainmentProvider who created the performance may cancel it.

    generateBookingRecord() - Method in class model.Booking
    Generates a human-readable booking record string containing all relevant details.

    Returns all active bookings for this performance.

    Returns a formatted string containing the booking details needed for processing refunds during performance cancellation.

    hasActiveBookings() - Method in class model.Performance

    Checks whether this event already has a performance whose time range overlaps with the given range.

    L

    loadPreregisteredData(EntertainmentProvider) - Method in class controller.EventPerformanceController
     
    login() - Method in class controller.UserController
    Prompts the user for their email and password, then searches the registered users for a match.
    LOGIN - Enum constant in enum class controller.GuestMenuOptions
     
    logout() - Method in class controller.UserController
    Clears the currently logged-in user, returning the system to guest mode.

    M

    mainMenu() - Method in class controller.MenuController
    Starts the main menu loop.
    MenuController - Class in controller
    The MenuController presents role-specific menus to the user (guest, student, entertainment provider, or admin staff) and routes the chosen option to the appropriate specialised controller.
    MenuController(View) - Constructor for class controller.MenuController
    Constructs a new MenuController, wiring up all sub-controllers with a shared performance list.
    model - package model
     
    Movie - Enum constant in enum class model.EventType
     
    Music - Enum constant in enum class model.EventType
     

    P

    PAYMENTFAILED - Enum constant in enum class model.BookingStatus
     
    Performance - Class in model
    Represents a single scheduled performance of an Event in the university events app.

    Constructs a new Performance.

    StudentMenuOptions - Enum Class in controller
     
    StudentPreferences - Class in model
    Holds the preferences for a Student user.
    StudentPreferences() - Constructor for class model.StudentPreferences
    Constructs default student preferences with all event types set to false (no preference).

    T

    TextUserInterface - Class in view
    A text-based (console) implementation of the View interface for the university events app.
    TextUserInterface() - Constructor for class view.TextUserInterface
    Constructs a new TextUserInterface reading from System.in.
    Theatre - Enum constant in enum class model.EventType
     
    toString() - Method in class model.AdminStaff
     
    toString() - Method in class model.Booking
    Returns a string representation of this booking.
    toString() - Method in class model.EntertainmentProvider
    Returns a string representation of this EP.
    toString() - Method in class model.Event
    Returns a string representation of this event.
    toString() - Method in class model.Performance
    Returns a string representation of this performance.
    toString() - Method in class model.Student
    Returns a string representation of the student.
    toString() - Method in class model.StudentPreferences
    Returns a string summarising these preferences.
    toString() - Method in class model.User
    Returns a string representation of the user.

    updatePreferences(String) - Method in class model.StudentPreferences
    Updates preferences from a raw string input.

    Abstract base class representing a user of the university events app.
